info.name: text-delete
info.text: Not everyone can win all the time in life

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes other people seem to have already played the game of life, and have learned the rules in advance.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can usually tell who is winning in life, but no one can find the instruction book.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Not everyone plays by the same set of rules in the game of life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: No one starts in exactly the same place, but you can decide for yourself where your goalposts are in this game called life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: As with any game, the important thing is to do your best and enjoy yourself along the way.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Cheating can help you score more points in the game of life, but it might cause others to stop playing on your side.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is neither a sprint nor an individual marathon; it's a relay race where you decide who to pass the baton onto.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The only way to truly lose the game of life is to decide to stop playing prematurely.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can play a slow and steady game, or you can go big or go home, but in life, the stakes of the game are higher.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Nobody wears team jerseys in the game of life, and perhaps good sportsmanship suffers as a result.
